creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
You mentioned on IRC that the current patch here in obsolete. Could you
supply me with the state of the art one? I'd like to include it in the
exprun soon-ish.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

arch> I went grocery shopping, made a pot of chilli, played ey,
then ate some chilli
